svg.title: DynamoDB operational tables — healthcare data platform
svg.desc: Six DynamoDB tables showing who writes to them, when, and what they track

g.text: One row per file — duplicate detection, Bronze path, record count, quarantine count
Written by: Lambda (every file) · send_test_data (test seeds)
One row per bad record — DQ rule violated, raw record, facility_id, resolved flag
Written by: Lambda (on every DQ failure) · query to audit quarantined records
One row per file processed — pass rate %, status (PASS/WARN/FAIL), error summary
Written by: Lambda (after every file) · tracks DQ health trend per dataset over time
One row per unique column set — conditional write, won't overwrite existing versions
Written by: Lambda (first time a new schema is seen) · tracks schema drift over time
One row per job+source pair — last processed S3 prefix, offset, run timestamp
Written by: Databricks Bronze/Silver notebooks at end of each successful run
